title: Is there a way for clients to track their own order status?
excerpt:

posts.author: floresabeirario (Flores à Beira-Rio)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! I use Monday.com to manage custom orders. When a client wants to order something, they fill out a Monday form, which automatically creates a new item in my board.

What I’d like to do is give each client a link or space where they can check the status of their order at any time.

Each order goes through several stages (e.g. item received → designing →being framed → shipped), and each order/client corresponds to one item on the board. I need the client to only be able to see their own item (order) not anyone else’s.

Does anyone know if this is possible in Monday, or if there’s any tool or platform that can make it happen?

Thanks in advance for any tips!
